title: Apple Foundation Model in Xcode-Beta
abstract: opens a port on 1977 to forward traffic to 1976, which is serving Apple's local foundation model.  makes it possible to code in Xcode using Apple Intelligence with no cloud dependencies by repairing the bugs in apple's internal regex in macOS 27 and Xcode-beta.
abstract_zh: opens a port on 1977 to forward traffic to 1976, which is serving Apple's local foundation model.  makes it possible to code in Xcode using Apple Intelligence with no cloud dependencies by repairing the bugs in apple's internal regex in macOS 27 and Xcode-beta.
